        <script>
            if(window.H5guard){
                H5guard.init({
                    xhrHook: true,
                    fetchHook: true,
                    domains: ['epassport.meituan.com', 'fepassport.sjst.test.sankuai.com'],
                });
            }
        </script>
        <!-- H5Guard end -->

        <script>
            window.__PAGE_NAME = "login";
            window.STATIC_ASSET_VERSION = "202605262251-production-ba32e4-stable";

            window.fpDetect = {
                wmSystemApi: !!window.wmSystemApi,
                windowWebdriver: !!(window.navigator && window.navigator.webdriver),
                isPhantom: !!(window.callPhantom || window._phantom),
                windowChrome: !!window.chrome,
                windowChromeRuntime: !!(window.chrome && window.chrome.runtime)
            };
        </script>

        <script>
            function dexieInternalRejectionIntercepter(event) {
                var isFromDexie = false;
                try {
                    if ( event.promise && !!event.promise._PSD ) {
                        isFromDexie = true;
                    }
                } catch (e) {}

                if (isFromDexie) {
                    event.stopPropagation();
                    event.stopImmediatePropagation();

                    if (window.Owl && window.Owl.addError) {
                        window.Owl.addError({name: 'Dexie内部rejection', msg: e.reason}, {level: 'warn'})
                    }
                }
            }
            // 拦截器需要早于Owl加载
            window.addEventListener("unhandledrejection", dexieInternalRejectionIntercepter);
        </script>

        <!-- Owl 预采集模块 start -->
